title: Touch Grass
description:
The perfect mudpack (typo intended) for going outside and touching some grass!
Just an exploration modpack me and my friends put up really quickly so we could play together.
Feel free to check it out if you're interested!
body:
# Touch Grass ![Modpack logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iCnM1RRS/8d19087342c0175773a937cdce5c5c47b12ec22d.png) --- ### Just another exploration modpack put up quickly with some mods me and my friends thought were interesting. #### I'm just uploading it here so other people can check it out and my friends can download and install it more easily. --- ### Some of the features of this modpack are:
Features - No Optifine cause breaks other mods and closed source is bad - Simple Voice Chat for speaking to your friends like a gigachad - REI so your small brain can keep track of all the items and recipes in the game - Do a Barrel Roll so you and your friends can do cool tricks with an elytra - Essential Mod cause... you have friends, right? - More biomes to explore - Aether, a place you'll never go to - Some overly complicated machinery mods that i dont understand - Dogs - Cool resource packs like Overly Dramatic Skys and Fresh Animations - Optimization mods so your potato toaster pc can handle the intense square graphics - Some mods to ensure stuff doesn't break - Other stuff that im too lazy to mention
##### If you want to see every mod in this modpack, just select any version and scroll down to see a list of them. ##### Or even better, INSTALL THE MODPACK and go to the mods section. ## Project Attributions #### These mods and resource packs are not available on modrinth, so I had to grab them from CurseForge, and because of that I have to mention them here and link to their respective pages OR ELSE they couldn't be in the modpack. #### **So here they are:**
Mods - [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs) - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) - [Citadel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel) - [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) - [Cyclic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic) - [Dungeon Crawl](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-crawl) - [Dungeons Enhanced](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeonsenhanced) - [Explorer's Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explorers-compass) - [Macaw's Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges) - [Nature's Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass) - [U Team Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/u-team-core) - [Useful Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/useful-backpacks)
Resource Packs - [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) - [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions) (I used the Details and the Emissive add-on, and the next version will have the Objects add-on)
## Extra Mods #### Due to licensing issues, I can't add these mods to my modpack, since their creators don't allow it. #### So if you want the full grass-touching experience and server compatibility, I ***highly recommend*** adding the following mods:
See mods - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) | [[Direct Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty/download/4445167)] - [Better Villages - Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-village-forge) | [[Direct Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-village-forge/download/4491920)] - [Library Ferret - Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/library-ferret-forge) | [[Direct Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/library-ferret-forge/download/4444826)] (dependency for the above mod) ##### (Direct links download the mod instantly)
## Disclaimer #### As I already mentioned, this modpack was put up really quickly, so things are not that well tested. I've checked the basics: - Check if it opens (lol) - Verify that there are no mod conflicts - Test if all the mods work But things are not thoughtfully tested, so expect some things to break and/or it not running well on your machine. ##### That's all, have fun with the modpack! ###### Now, go outside and touch some real grass 🏞️
